name: lendly-backend
description: Lendly peer-to-peer equipment rental marketplace — backend

scripts.db:psql: docker exec -it lendly_postgres psql -U lendly -d lendly_dev
scripts.db:verify: docker exec lendly_postgres psql -U lendly -d lendly_dev -c "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' ORDER BY table_name;"
